CustomField.description: Uses PMI Rates as follows: IF Mortgage Amount / Sale Price > 0.9501 THEN PMI = Mortgage Amount * PMI Rate >95% Calculates for >95%, >90%, >85, and >80%. If it does not meet these conditions, the PMI is set to $0.00.
CustomField.formula:
IF( IAW_Property_Type__c = "Mobile or Manufactured Home", 0.00,
IF( IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c / IAW_Sale_Price__c > 0.9501, IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c * IAW_PMI_Rate_95__c / 12,
IF( IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c / IAW_Sale_Price__c > 0.9001, IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c * IAW_PMI_Rate_90__c / 12,
IF( IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c / IAW_Sale_Price__c > 0.8501, IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c * IAW_PMI_Rate_85__c / 12,
IF( IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c / IAW_Sale_Price__c > 0.8001, IAW_Mortgage_Amount__c * IAW_PMI_Rate_80__c / 12,
0.00)))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Uses PMI Rates as follows: IF Mortgage Amount / Sale Price > 0.9501 THEN PMI = Mortgage Amount * PMI Rate >95% Calculates for >95%, >90%, >85, and >80%. If it does not meet these conditions, the PMI is set to $0.00.
CustomField.label: PMI
